content: Remote OK Supply Chain Systems Analyst Wing <strong>About Wing: <br><br></strong>Wing offers drone delivery as a safe, fast, and sustainable solution for last mile logistics. Consumer appetites for on-demand services are increasing, but current delivery methods are inefficient, costly, and contribute to road accidents and air pollution. Wingâs fleet of highly automated delivery drones can transport small packages directly from businesses to homes on-demand, in minutes. We design, build, and operate our aircraft, and offer drone delivery services on two continents. Our technology is designed to be easy to integrate into existing delivery and logistics networks, offering a scalable drone delivery solution for a broad range of businesses. Wing is a part of Google's parent company, Alphabet, and our mission is to create the preferred means of delivery for the planet. If you're ready to do the greatest work of your life, come join us.<br><br><strong>About the Role:<br><br></strong>Wing is looking for a <strong>Supply Chain Systems Analyst</strong> to join our <strong>Manufacturing Operations </strong>team. This role is <strong>based remotely in the United States</strong>. As a Supply Chain Systems Analyst, you will be designing and providing solutions that enable supply chain functions for Wingâs manufacturing, logistics and supply chain operations. You will be the primary link between our physical drone production and our digital ecosystem, supporting a dynamic systems landscape spanning a group of tools and technologies. You won't just be drawing diagrams, you will design the logic, write the requirements, andâwhen necessaryâ work alongside developers to solve supply chain business problems using industry best practices.<br><br><strong>What Youâll Do: <br><br></strong><ul><li>Design and implement supply chain system solutions using custom built and supply chain/enterprise systems (ERP, MRP, WMS, TMS, Data Visualization Tools) to enable manufacturing, logistics, inventory and supply chain operations</li><li>Lead and manage systems implementation projects, from business requirements definition through user acceptance testing and deployment into production use</li><li>Manage internal and external development programs to implement system solutions in alignment with the business plan</li><li>Drive cross-functional collaboration to architect robust data exchange (API/EDI) integrations between Wingâs data systems and external partners, inclusive of manufacturing execution systems, inventory management systems, warehouse management systems, and MRP systems</li><li>Provide high fidelity business requirements documents and technical specs that allow development teams to execute with zero ambiguity <br><br></li></ul><strong>What Youâll Need: <br><br></strong><ul><li>8+ years of hands-on experience designing and implementing supply chain systems. Strong knowledge of ERP systems (preferably SAP) and a proven ability to deliver efficient planning solutions in complex, global enterprise environments</li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience </li><li>Demonstrated experience building integrated systems throughout the entire life-cycle by designing and implementing Supply Chain systems, such as ERP, MRP, WMS, and TMS</li><li>Hands on experience with SAP S/4 HANA and customizing it for the business needs</li><li>Demonstrated ability to translate business requirements into effective solutions. Proven ability to lead IT-focused projects within a supply chain setting</li><li>Deep understanding of materials management, logistics (forward and reverse), inventory management, procurement, finance principles</li><li>Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills, with experience working in global teams</li><li>Demonstrated ability to work in ambiguous environments and adapt to rapidly changing landscapes<br><br></li></ul>The US base salary range for this full-time position is the salary range below + bonus + equity + benefits. Wingâs salary ranges are determined by role, level, and location. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your location during the hiring process.<br><br>Salary Range: $140,000 USD - $185,000 USD<br><br>Wing is an equal opportunity employer and it is Wing's policy to comply with all applicable national, state and local laws pertaining to nondiscrimination and equal opportunity. Employment at Wing is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications directly related to professional competence. Wing does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law.<br><br>If you have a need that requires accommodation during the interview process due to a disability or special need, please let us know by completing our Candidate Accommodations Request Form. analyst, design, sys admin Palo Alto, Palo Alto, California, United States 2026-07-14T03:02:42+00:00 1134803 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-supply-chain-systems-analyst-wing-1134803 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Caretaker City Buildings Jobs in Council <strong>Applications for this position are open until a suitable pool of candidates is received. This means the vacancy may close without notice. If you are interested in this position, we highly recommend you apply as soon as possible.<br><br></strong><strong>Together, we're working to build a vibrant and sustainable regional city... and we would love for you to join us.<br><br></strong>In the heart of the Goldfields, Kalgoorlie-Boulder is a modern and thriving city that embodies the true spirit of a regional community.
